generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion for gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed for crane environment"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series swing angle measurements from hoist"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Wind speed measurements from anemometer"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance Fusion360CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of gantry crane created using Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360Enabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation of gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGenerationEnabler
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model for crane dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance ArcadiaModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MBSE models created using Capella's Arcadia method"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CapellaEnabler
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB for time-series data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana for data visualization and dashboarding"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for real-time communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService, HMIService
]

instance DockerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker for containerizing digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService, VisualizationService, TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, HMIService
]

instance PythonGantrylibEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module gantrylib for crane control and data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService, TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, HMIService
]

instance Fusion360Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion360 for CAD modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance CapellaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Capella for Model-Based Systems Engineering using Arcadia"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance ArduinoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arduino for sensor data acquisition and control signals"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService, HMIService
]

instance TMC4671EvalControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controllers for stepper motor control"
    DTDFVocab:enables HMIService
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for kinematic model processing in trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for crane dynamics simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance KiCadEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "KiCad for hardware schematic design"
    DTDFVocab:enables HardwareDesignService
]

instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs sensor data to TimescaleDB for persistent storage"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataLoggingAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualizes crane status and data via Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeStatusVisualization
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal crane movement trajectories using kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectorySuggestion
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane dynamics for validation and prediction"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares real-time measurements against simulation for fault detection"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlert
]

instance HMIService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Human Machine Interface for operator control and monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperatorControlAction
]

instance HardwareDesignService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Designs hardware schematics for crane control system"
    DTDFVocab:provides HardwareDesignInsight
]

instance DataLoggingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated data logging process to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ValidationAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alerts for threshold breaches in continuous validation process"
]

instance TrajectorySuggestion : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory suggestions for crane movement based on kinematic model"
]

instance RealTimeStatusVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane status for operator decisions"
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated crane dynamics results for validation purposes"
]

instance OperatorControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual control actions for crane movement by operator"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance HardwareDesignInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Hardware schematic design for system components"
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling cart movement along crane frame"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling hoist vertical movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for picking up containers at hoist end"
]

instance CraneFrame : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural frame of the lab-scale gantry crane system"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands from Trajectory Generator Service and Control Application sent via Physical Crane Interface to motor controllers and electromagnet for physical movement execution."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization for data logging and validation, with no specific sampling rate specified in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated as a set of containers on a single PC: Physical Crane hardware connected via Python interface to Control Application, Logging Application, HMI; services (database, dashboard, trajectory generator, simulation, continuous validation) interconnected via MQTT and TimescaleDB."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers as-designed (CAD models in Autodesk Fusion360) and as-operated phases, with continuous validation and simulation during operational use."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares measured trajectory data against simulation results using distance metrics and thresholds; model validation techniques from [5] applied for verification."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for inter-service communication; SQL queries for TimescaleDB access; physical interface via Python to hardware controllers."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Hosted on a single personal computer with Docker containers for database, MQTT broker, and dashboard; Python applications installed via pip for other services."
]
